hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】一家又一家银行放弃了美联储降息的预测。比特币不在乎。；【WORLD】随着世界因伊朗战争而分心，以色列定居者加剧了对约旦河西岸的袭击；【CRYPTO】随着加密攻击转向社会工程，Ripple 分享与朝鲜相关的威胁数据。

items.title: One bank after another scraps Fed rate-cut forecasts. Bitcoin doesn't care.
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for May 5, 2026
items.title_zh: 一家又一家银行放弃了美联储降息的预测。比特币不在乎。
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 5 月 5 日天气预报

items.title: With World Distracted by Iran War, Israeli Settlers Intensify Attacks in West Bank
items.summary: Israel has failed to arrest a wave of violence against Palestinians, prompting military officials to urge the government to intervene.
items.title_zh: 随着世界因伊朗战争而分心，以色列定居者加剧了对约旦河西岸的袭击
items.summary_zh: 以色列未能阻止针对巴勒斯坦人的暴力浪潮，促使军方官员敦促政府进行干预。

items.title: Ripple shares North Korea-linked threat data as crypto attacks shift to social engineering
items.summary: The recent $280 million Drift incident has demonstrated a shift toward more sophisticated social engineering tactics.
items.title_zh: 随着加密攻击转向社会工程，Ripple 分享与朝鲜相关的威胁数据
items.summary_zh: 最近价值 2.8 亿美元的 Drift 事件表明社会工程策略已转向更复杂的策略。

items.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 在 FedRAMP 中可用
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 可通过 FedRAMP 对 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 OpenAI API 进行中等授权，从而为美国联邦机构提供安全的 AI 采用。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Hegseth Calls U.S. Military Effort in Strait Defensive and Temporary
items.summary: An Iranian official accused the United States of violating a cease-fire after Iranian forces fired at vessels that the U.S. Navy was guiding through the Strait of Hormuz. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Gen. Dan Caine are holding a news conference.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：赫格斯称美国在海峡防御和临时军事行动
items.summary_zh: 伊朗军队向美国海军引导通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只开火后，一名伊朗官员指责美国违反停火协议。国防部长皮特·赫格斯和丹·凯恩将军正在举行新闻发布会。

items.title: US spot bitcoin ETFs draw $532 million as inflows extend to a third day, led by BlackRock and Fidelity
items.summary: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs drew $532 million on Monday, marking a third straight day of inflows, led by BlackRock and Fidelity.
items.title_zh: 美国现货比特币 ETF 吸引资金 5.32 亿美元，资金流入已连续第三天增长，其中贝莱德 (BlackRock) 和富达 (Fidelity) 领涨
items.summary_zh: 美国现货比特币 ETF 周一吸引了 5.32 亿美元资金，连续第三天流入，其中贝莱德 (BlackRock) 和富达 (Fidelity) 领涨。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: UniCredit CEO says taking control of Commerzbank ‘not the expected scenario’
items.summary: The Italian lender is making a takeover bid for German rival Commerzbank, despite pushback in Germany.
items.title_zh: 联合信贷银行首席执行官表示，控制德国商业银行“不是预期的情况”
items.summary_zh: 尽管遭到德国的反对，这家意大利银行仍在向德国竞争对手德国商业银行提出收购要约。

items.title: Traffic in the Strait of Hormuz won’t return to normal until August or later, according to Kalshi traders
items.summary: With a lack of a breakthrough in negotiations between the U.S. and Iran, traders increasingly see traffic returning to normal later and later.
items.title_zh: 卡尔什贸易商表示，霍尔木兹海峡的交通要到八月或更晚才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 由于美国和伊朗之间的谈判缺乏突破，交易员越来越认为交通恢复正常的时间越来越晚。

items.title: Berkshire shares trade lower even after Abel scores good marks at meeting, earnings jump
items.summary: Many in the investment community were reassured by Abel's firm grasp over Berkshire's sprawling enterprise.
items.title_zh: 即使阿贝尔在会议上取得好成绩、盈利大幅增长，伯克希尔股价仍走低
items.summary_zh: 阿贝尔对伯克希尔庞大企业的坚定控制让投资界的许多人感到放心。

items.title: Greg Abel earns solid scorecard from Berkshire shareholders after first annual meeting
items.summary: The reviews from longtime shareholders and professional investors were broadly positive, even as many acknowledged the notable absence of Warren Buffett.
items.title_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔在第一次年度会议后从伯克希尔股东那里获得了良好的记分卡
items.summary_zh: 长期股东和专业投资者的评价总体上是积极的，尽管许多人承认沃伦·巴菲特明显缺席。

items.title: Ukrainian drone hits upmarket Moscow high-rise ahead of Victory Day celebrations
items.summary: Russia has declared a unilateral ceasefire to cover the event and threatened a massive strike on central Kyiv if it were disrupted.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰无人机在胜利日庆祝活动前袭击莫斯科高档高层建筑
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯已宣布单方面停火以报道这一事件，并威胁称，如果事件受到干扰，将对基辅市中心发动大规模袭击。

items.title: Toncoin surges 36% as Telegram replaces TON Foundation and slashes fees
items.summary: The market is repricing TON as a Telegram-led ecosystem again, not just a foundation-run chain with a messaging app narrative attached.
items.title_zh: Telegram 取代 TON 基金会并削减费用，Toncoin 飙升 36%
items.summary_zh: 市场再次将 TON 重新定价为 Telegram 主导的生态系统，而不仅仅是一个附有消息应用叙述的基金会运营的链。

items.title: Coinbase cuts 14% of staff as AI reshapes how crypto companies operate
items.summary: Brian Armstrong, the CEO at Coinbase, announced a workforce reduction of roughly 660 from its current 4,700.
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能重塑加密货币公司的运营方式，Coinbase 裁员 14%
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 首席执行官布莱恩·阿姆斯特朗 (Brian Armstrong) 宣布将裁员约 660 人，目前员工人数为 4,700 人。

items.title: Bank of Italy calls for EU to explore tokenized SEPA payments
items.summary: Bank of Italy's Chiara Scotti said the EU should explore a tokenized extension of its payments system as tokenization grows more "relevant."
items.title_zh: 意大利央行呼吁欧盟探索代币化 SEPA 支付
items.summary_zh: 意大利银行的 Chiara Scotti 表示，随着代币化变得更加“相关”，欧盟应该探索其支付系统的代币化扩展。

items.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
items.summary: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和普华永道合作重新构想 CFO 办公室
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和普华永道正在合作，帮助企业使用人工智能代理实现财务工作流程自动化、改进预测、加强控制以及实现 CFO 职能现代化。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: State Street and Galaxy launch tokenized fund to bring cash management onchain
items.summary: The fund lets institutions earn yield on stablecoins while moving cash onchain with round-the-clock access.
items.title_zh: 道富银行和 Galaxy 推出代币化基金，将现金管理带入链上
items.summary_zh: 该基金让机构能够通过稳定币赚取收益，同时通过全天候访问在链上转移现金。

items.title: K Wave Media scraps massive bitcoin treasury plan to redirect $485 million to AI
items.summary: The Nasdaq-listed firm raised $500 million to invest in bitcoin. Less than a year later, it is chasing the market's current hot sector of AI.
items.title_zh: K Wave Media 取消大规模比特币金库计划，将 4.85 亿美元转向人工智能
items.summary_zh: 这家纳斯达克上市公司筹集了 5 亿美元投资比特币。不到一年后，它就开始追逐当前市场热门的人工智能领域。

items.title: Bitcoin absorbed $200 million profit-taking at $80,000 in a bullish sign for BTC
items.summary: Net realized profits hit a one-month high of $207.56 million Sunday as bitcoin crossed $80,000 for the first time since January, with the price holding above the breakout level into Tuesday despite the heavy sell-side flow.
items.title_zh: 比特币在 80,000 美元的价格吸收了 2 亿美元的获利回吐，这是 BTC 的看涨信号
items.summary_zh: 周日，比特币自 1 月份以来首次突破 80,000 美元，实现净利润达到一个月高点 2.0756 亿美元，尽管卖方资金大量流入，但价格在周二仍保持在突破水平之上。

items.title: Bitcoin tops $80,000 as altcoins rally and risk appetite returns
items.summary: Crypto markets climb Tuesday with BTC above $80,000, altcoins gaining momentum, and investors rotating into higher-risk plays amid improving sentiment.
items.title_zh: 随着山寨币反弹和风险偏好回归，比特币突破 80,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 加密货币市场周二攀升，比特币突破 80,000 美元，山寨币势头强劲，投资者在情绪改善的情况下转向高风险投资。

items.title: FalconX and Sygnum partner to launch tokenized credit offering for institutional clients
items.summary: FalconX’s facility extends credit through a special-purpose vehicle, backed by overcollateralized loans and monitored in real time.
items.title_zh: FalconX 和 Sygnum 合作为机构客户推出代币化信贷产品
items.summary_zh: FalconX 的设施通过特殊目的工具提供信贷，由超额抵押贷款支持并进行实时监控。

items.title: Coinbase Australia launches crypto support for self-directed retirement funds
items.summary: Coinbase Australia has launched crypto support for self-directed retirement funds, offering investors another avenue to diversify portfolios.
items.title_zh: Coinbase Australia 为自主退休基金推出加密货币支持
items.summary_zh: Coinbase Australia 为自主退休基金推出了加密货币支持，为投资者提供了另一种多元化投资组合的途径。

items.title: Where the goblins came from
items.summary: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.
items.title_zh: 哥布林从哪里来
items.summary_zh: goblin 输出如何在 AI 模型中传播：时间线、根本原因以及 GPT-5 行为中个性驱动的怪癖背后的修复。

items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型、Codex 和托管代理来到 AWS
items.summary_zh: OpenAI GPT 模型、Codex 和托管代理现已在 AWS 上提供，使企业能够在其 AWS 环境中构建安全的 AI。

items.title: Our commitment to community safety
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
items.title_zh: 我们对社区安全的承诺
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何通过模型保障、误用检测、策略执行以及与安全专家的协作来保护 ChatGPT 中的社区安全。

items.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
items.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
items.title_zh: Microsoft OpenAI 合作伙伴关系的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和微软宣布了一项修订后的协议，该协议简​​化了合作伙伴关系，增加了长期清晰度，并支持大规模的持续人工智能创新。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from April 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 4 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 4 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金变得越来越紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: Milken-adjacent Power100 attendees aim to reclaim the DEI in finance narrative
items.summary: Blueprint Capital's Power100 weekend convenes diverse leaders in finance ahead of the Milken Institute Global Conference.
items.title_zh: 米尔肯相邻的 Power100 与会者旨在重新夺回金融叙事中的 DEI
items.summary_zh: Blueprint Capital 的 Power100 周末在米尔肯研究所全球会议之前聚集了金融界的不同领导人。

items.title: HSBC shares drop as first-quarter pre-tax profit misses estimates on higher expected credit losses
items.summary: Europe's largest lender HSBC on Tuesday reported first-quarter pre-tax profit of $9.4 billion, marginally missing analysts' estimates.
items.title_zh: 由于预期信贷损失增加，第一季度税前利润未达预期，汇丰股价下跌
items.summary_zh: 欧洲最大的银行汇丰银行周二公布第一季度税前利润为 94 亿美元，略低于分析师的预期。

items.title: Traders are doubtful Cohen's GameStop can pull off monster eBay acquisition
items.summary: Traders on Kalshi and Polymarket give the company just a 25% and 15% chance, respectively, of successfully buying the online marketplace.
items.title_zh: 交易员怀疑科恩的 GameStop 能否完成 eBay 的巨额收购
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 上的交易者认为该公司成功购买在线市场的机会分别只有 25% 和 15%。

items.title: Kalshi traders see April jobs report coming in better than economists' estimates
items.summary: The figure is higher than consensus estimates for 57,000 jobs gained in April, according to analysts polled by FactSet.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为四月份就业报告好于经济学家的预期
items.summary_zh: FactSet 调查的分析师称，这一数字高于 4 月份新增 57,000 个就业岗位的普遍预期。

items.title: Anthropic teams with Goldman, Blackstone and others on $1.5 billion AI venture targeting PE-owned firms
items.summary: The move marks Anthropic's latest effort to deepen its lead in the market for enterprise AI as competition intensifies with rivals including OpenAI
items.title_zh: Anthropic 与高盛、黑石等公司合作，针对私募股权公司发起 15 亿美元的人工智能风险投资
items.summary_zh: 随着与 OpenAI 等竞争对手的竞争加剧，此举标志着 Anthropic 为加深其在企业人工智能市场的领先地位而做出的最新努力

items.title: World Cup prize pool nears $900 million as FIFA boosts payouts. Here’s who gets what
items.summary: FIFA's upcoming World Cup is set to be the most lucrative on-record, with a 'record breaking' prize pool on offer, as FIFA shrugs off other controversies.
items.title_zh: 随着国际足联增加奖金，世界杯奖金池接近 9 亿美元。这是谁得到什么
items.summary_zh: 国际足联即将举办的世界杯将成为有记录以来最赚钱的世界杯，奖金池将“破纪录”，而国际足联对其他争议不屑一顾。

items.title: Explosion at China fireworks factory kills 26 people
items.summary: A blast at a fireworks factory in Hunan province has killed 26 people and injured 61, state media report.
items.title_zh: 中国烟花爆竹厂爆炸已造成26人死亡
items.summary_zh: 据官方媒体报道，湖南省一家烟花厂发生爆炸，已造成 26 人死亡、61 人受伤。

items.title: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
items.summary: A 33-year-old German citizen was detained following the incident, the authorities say.
items.title_zh: 德国莱比锡市一辆汽车冲入人群，造成两人死亡、多人受伤
items.summary_zh: 当局称，事件发生后，一名 33 岁的德国公民被拘留。

items.title: Second hantavirus case confirmed after deaths on cruise ship
items.summary: The operator of the MV Hondius ship says a Dutch couple and a German national have died.
items.title_zh: 游轮死亡后确认第二例汉坦病毒病例
items.summary_zh: MV Hondius 轮船的运营商表示，一对荷兰夫妇和一名德国国民死亡。

items.title: The most talked-about looks at this year's Met Gala
items.summary: The theme for 2026 Met Gala fundraiser is "Costume Art", exploring fashion as an embodied art form.
items.title_zh: 今年 Met Gala 上最受关注的造型
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 Met Gala 筹款活动的主题是“服装艺术”，探索时尚作为一种具体的艺术形式。

items.title: Rescuers among three dead after yacht sinks off Australian coast
items.summary: Volunteer rescuers aged 78 and 62 died after their boat rolled during "treacherous" conditions.
items.title_zh: 游艇在澳大利亚海岸沉没 救援人员三人死亡
items.summary_zh: 78 岁和 62 岁的志愿者救援人员在他们的船在“危险”的条件下翻滚后死亡。

items.title: A 'fun' superstar stuns rivals and reshapes politics in an Indian state
items.summary: Film star Vijay has defied naysayers to almost sweep Tamil Nadu polls, marking a break in the political order.
items.title_zh: 一位“有趣”的超级巨星震惊对手并重塑印度一个邦的政治
items.summary_zh: 电影明星维杰不顾反对者的反对，几乎横扫泰米尔纳德邦民意调查，标志着政治秩序的突破。

items.title: Popular Australian author pleads guilty over child exploitation material
items.summary: The Jasper Jones and Runt author was arrested in January during a police raid at his Perth home.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚著名作家就剥削儿童内容认罪
items.summary_zh: 《贾斯珀·琼斯与鲁特》的作者于一月份在警方突袭其位于珀斯的家中被捕。

items.title: Deadly China plane crash was caused by fuel cut-off, says report
items.summary: The Boeing 737 plane crashed into a Chinese hillside in 2022, killing all 132 people on board.
items.title_zh: 报告称，致命的中国飞机失事是由于燃油切断造成的
items.summary_zh: 2022年，波音737飞机坠入中国山坡，机上132人全部遇难。

items.title: Rapper Kid Cudi removes British star M.I.A. from tour
items.summary: British singer songwriter M.I.A will no longer be the opening act for Rebels Rage tour after disagreement with US rapper Kid Cudi.
items.title_zh: 说唱歌手 Kid Cudi 移除了英国明星 M.I.A.从旅游
items.summary_zh: 由于与美国说唱歌手 Kid Cudi 发生分歧，英国创作型歌手 M.I.A 将不再担任 Rebels Rage 巡演的开场嘉宾。

items.title: In Venezuela, Trump Vowed to Show Accountability. But Secret Oil Deals Linger.
items.summary: Trump officials and their Venezuelan allies have promised a new era of accountability to unlock Venezuela’s immense oil wealth. But the country’s oil industry remains a black hole.
items.title_zh: 在委内瑞拉，特朗普誓言要承担责任。但秘密石油交易依然存在。
items.summary_zh: 特朗普官员及其委内瑞拉盟友承诺开启问责新时代，以释放委内瑞拉巨大的石油财富。但该国的石油工业仍然是一个黑洞。

items.title: The Growing Rift Between the UAE and Saudi Arabia, Explained
items.summary: Officials say competition between the countries is healthy. But tensions are mounting over energy quotas, regional conflicts and their different visions for the Middle East.
items.title_zh: 阿联酋和沙特阿拉伯之间日益扩大的裂痕解释
items.summary_zh: 官员们表示，两国之间的竞争是健康的。但由于能源配额、地区冲突以及两国对中东的不同愿景，紧张局势正在加剧。

items.title: Rare Comet Appears Over New Zealand, Australia and South Africa
items.summary: Known as C/2025 R3 PANSTARRS, the comet will be visible to stargazers using a telescope in New Zealand, Australia and South Africa.
items.title_zh: 罕见彗星出现在新西兰、澳大利亚和南非上空
items.summary_zh: 这颗被称为 C/2025 R3 PANSTARRS 的彗星将被新西兰、澳大利亚和南非的观星者使用望远镜观测到。

items.title: What a Bike Ride in Cape Town Taught Me About Apartheid
items.summary: A New York Times reporter joined a group of cyclists on a route meant to break down Cape Town’s lingering racial and economic barriers.
items.title_zh: 在开普敦骑自行车让我了解了种族隔离
items.summary_zh: 《纽约时报》的一名记者加入了一群骑自行车的人，踏上了一条旨在打破开普敦挥之不去的种族和经济障碍的路线。

items.title: Taiwan Could Learn From Ukraine. Informally, Connections Are Growing.
items.summary: The governments have no official diplomatic or military ties. But a loose network led by company executives and volunteers is bridging some of that gulf.
items.title_zh: 台湾可以向乌克兰学习。非正式地，联系正在增长。
items.summary_zh: 两国政府没有正式的外交或军事关系。但由公司高管和志愿者领导的松散网络正在弥合部分鸿沟。

items.title: Cruise Ship Struck by Hantavirus Remains at Sea
items.summary: Passengers on the MV Hondius have not received permission from the authorities in Cape Verde, in the Atlantic Ocean, to disembark. Three people have died and at least three others were ill.
items.title_zh: 被汉坦病毒袭击的游轮仍在海上
items.summary_zh: MV Hondius 上的乘客尚未获得大西洋佛得角当局的下船许可。三人死亡，至少三人患病。

items.title_zh: 中国烟花厂爆炸造成至少26人死亡
items.summary_zh: 另有数十人在爆炸中受伤，这似乎是该国近年来最致命的爆炸之一。

items.title: The Uncertain Fate of France’s Last Two Captive Orcas
items.summary: France must decide what to do with two orcas marooned at a deserted marine park: move them to another park, or release them into an open-water sanctuary.

items.title: Standard Chartered expands further into crypto with stake in GSR at $1 billion valuation

items.title_zh: 渣打银行进一步进军加密货币领域，持有估值 10 亿美元的 GSR 股份
